objective: Add telemetry regression evidence for pending passing and failing Windows check states.
implementation: Added node 16 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 319 CI, merge, sync, and branch cleanup.
Added a Windows CI state regression fixture covering pending, passing, and failing check states.
Bound the state matrix to node 16 Windows wait telemetry and node 16 readback continuity.
Added a regression test that requires pending to wait, passing to merge only after all required checks, and failing to repair before merge.
